_readme: REFERENCE ONLY — this file is never served or validated by the API; podcasts.json is.
It shows the FULL episode shape, including the two OPTIONAL fields the shipped demo
episodes omit: populated `chapters` and `transcriptUrl`. Copy an entry from here into
podcasts.json (and bump nothing — `version` stays 1 for additive changes) to add one.
Required per episode: id, title, vendorId, trackId, durationSec (>0), audioUrl,
MUST resolve to a live manifest track (validator-enforced — no dangling audio).
chapters[].startSec must be strictly ascending and sit inside durationSec.
Audio hosting: the proper home is the S3/CloudFront media CDN via deploy-media.yml
two demo episodes in podcasts.json are TEMPORARILY git-hosted under
/content/<vendor>/podcasts/*.m4a so they play immediately; migrate them to the CDN
with the videos. groundingLabel is the 04 §4.5 derived-format label, rendered

episodes.title: CCA-F Deep Dive: Agentic Architectures (EXAMPLE)
episodes.groundingLabel: grounded: source transcript verified; synthesis spot-checked
